title: Esbjerg Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is hitting Esbjerg with a Z-Score of -3.11. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Esbjerg are extreme, with a high level of humidity at 80% and moderate winds at 8.6 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 11.9 GG, indicating a high energy demand for heating. 
 The city is experiencing a critical cold snap, with no Cooling Degree Days (CDD) and a significant impact on daily operations.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap in Esbjerg.
